protocols.description: Coordinated response to national or regional grid failure events.
protocols.activationCriteria: Loss of more than 30% of national generation capacity or widespread distribution failure.
protocols.communicationChain: ZESCO CEO → Ministry of Energy → State House → Public Media
protocols.decisionAuthority: ZESCO CEO with Ministry of Energy oversight

protocols.description: Response protocol for serious mine safety incidents including fatalities, collapses or toxic spills.
protocols.activationCriteria: Any fatality, serious injury, or environmental incident at a ZCCM-IH portfolio mine.
protocols.communicationChain: Mine Manager → ZCCM-IH COO → CEO → Board → Ministry of Mines → Media

scenarios.description: Severe drought reduces Kariba and Kafue Gorge reservoir levels, cutting ZESCO hydro generation by 40%.
scenarios.potentialImpact: National power deficit of 400MW. Load shedding of 8-12 hours per day. GDP impact estimated at 1.2%.
scenarios.mitigationStrategy: Emergency power imports from SAPP. Accelerate solar IPP procurement. Demand-side management.
scenarios.responsePlan: ZESCO Emergency Generation Plan activated. MoF emergency budget allocation.
scenarios.simulationOutcome: Response plan adequate but import capacity insufficient. Gaps identified.
scenarios.lessonsLearned: Need to pre-negotiate emergency import agreements with SAPP members.

scenarios.description: Global copper price falls below USD 5,000/tonne for more than 6 months.
scenarios.potentialImpact: ZCCM-IH dividend income falls by 60%. IDC portfolio value declines. Government revenue shortfall.
scenarios.mitigationStrategy: Diversification of portfolio. Hedging strategies. Cost reduction at portfolio mines.
scenarios.responsePlan: IDC Emergency Portfolio Review. MoF fiscal adjustment plan.
scenarios.simulationOutcome: Zambia highly exposed. Diversification strategy needs acceleration.
scenarios.lessonsLearned: Copper dependency remains critical vulnerability. Non-mining SOE development must accelerate.

events.description: Partial national grid failure due to transmission line fault in Lusaka South. Affected 1.2 million customers.
events.lessonsLearned: Redundancy in Lusaka South transmission corridor needed. Maintenance schedule reviewed.
